description: Our eyelash serum contains blueberry extract, echinacea extract, and tea tree oil. It can activate hair follicles to accelerate the growth of eyelashes, making your slender eyelashes appear longer and denser. The method of use is very simple: take an appropriate amount of the serum and brush it on your eyelashes and eyebrows. When brushing your eyelashes, you can apply a small amount at the root of the eyelid and the base of the eyelashes, and it can be used twice a day. If it accidentally falls into your eyes and causes discomfort, rinse immediately with water. After use, it helps to stimulate the regeneration of hair follicle cells and promote the growth of eyelashes and eyebrows. Let you quickly have fashionable long eyelashes that suit your eyebrow shape. Say goodbye to time-consuming false eyelashes and eyebrow pencils.
